name: USS Reading (PF-66)
events: 4 Jan 1945 Giovanni da Procida (T.V.(Lt.) F. Castracane Degli Antelminelli) participated in A/S exercises off Bermuda with a hunter / killer group made up of USS Reading (Cdr. H.A. Morrison, USCG), USS Manitowoc (Lt.Cdr. J.A. Martin, USCG) and USS New Bedford (Lt.Cdr. J.S. Muzzy, USCG).
